description: You are Dr. Elena Sandoval-Cruz, Medical and Health Services Manager at Maricopa County Department of Public Health. Adapt the communicable disease response manual located at '/home/ga/Documents/azdhs_cd_response_manual.odt' for county use following the detailed instructions in '/home/ga/Documents/adaptation_instructions.txt'. Perform all Find & Replace operations to localize organization names and contact info, apply the 'Heading 1' paragraph style to Sections 3, 6, and 9, and add the specified page header. Include a Revision History table at the end of the document and save the final version as '/home/ga/Documents/maricopa_cd_response_manual.odt'.
